name: criminal_justice_port_security_scanner_southport_tru_loy
premise: A judge must rule on sealing a transcript that names a minor while media already possesses an unredacted copy. In Criminal Justice, the situation tagged internally around criminal justice port security scanner southport tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Port corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mira Kim
agents.identity: I am Mira Kim, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Criminal Justice. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ansel Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Ansel Ishikawa, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Criminal Justice. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with loyalty.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to loyalty to preserve operational truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mira Kim must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Mira Kim do?
